data.title: Bitcoin Bullish Divergence That Appeared Before The May ATH Has Returned Again
data.description:
Bitcoin is currently hovering in a tightly compressed price range after failing multiple times to break above $110,000 earlier this month. The past few days have been characterized by the leading cryptocurrency trading around $105,000, with neither bulls nor bears taking control. Despite the overall consolidation, a subtle yet significant signal is starting to flash beneath the surface, particularly on the 4-hour chart, that might send Bitcoin to a new all-time high soon. Return Of Rare Divergence Pattern On Bitcoin’s 4H Chart Crypto analyst Luca (@CrypticTrades_) took to social media platform X to share a chart that highlights an important technical development on Bitcoin’s 4-hour timeframe: the return of a bullish divergence
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-bullish-divergence/

data.title: Hypernative Raises $40 Million for Crypto Security
data.description:
Catenaa, Wednesday, June 18, 2025- Hypernative, a cryptocurrency security startup, announced Tuesday it has raised $40 million in Series B financing. Venture firms Ten Eleven and Ballistic Ventures co-led the funding round. The Tel Aviv, Israel-based company plans to invest the new capital in its artificial intelligence-powered tools and to expand its workforce. Hypernative describes […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/hypernative-raises-40-million-for-crypto-security

data.title: US stocks end in the red for third day as Fed’s July rate cut promise fails to calm Middle East jitters
data.description:
Stocks slipped for a third straight session on Friday, with traders dumping risk as Middle East tensions kept heating up. The S&P 500 dropped 0. 22%, closing at 5,967. 84, while the Nasdaq Composite lost 0. 51% to end at 19,447. 41. Only the Dow Jones Industrial Average stayed afloat, up 35. 16 points, or 0. 08%, finishing at 42,206. 82. This […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-stocks-end-in-the-red-for-third-day/

The company stated it may offer an additional $50 million to initial buyers within 13 days of the issuance. IREN aims […]

data.title: Alex Mashinsky forfeits rights to Celsius assets amid ongoing bankruptcy process
data.description:
Alex Mashinsky, the former CEO of Celsius, has agreed to surrender all rights to assets tied to the collapsed crypto lender. According to newly filed court documents, Mashinsky and entities associated with him, including AM Ventures Holdings Inc. , Koala1 LLC, and Koala3 LLC, will be excluded from any future distributions under the Celsius bankruptcy plan
source: https://cryptoslate.com/alex-mashinsky-forfeits-rights-to-celsius-assets-amid-ongoing-bankruptcy-process/

data.title: Ethereum ETF inflows explode as traders rush back after months of silence
data.description:
Ethereum ETFs are finally waking up after months of being ignored. After launching in July 2024 with barely any excitement, these funds are now pulling in cash for the sixth straight week, and have booked inflows in eight of the last nine weeks. According to SoSoValue, this is the most consistent interest Ethereum ETFs have […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-etf-inflows-explode-after-months/

data.title: Ethereum News: Joseph Lubin Explains Why Market Still Undervalues ETH
data.description:
In Ethereum news headlines today, ConsenSys founder and Ethereum co-creator Joseph Lubin, argues that even the most bullish market models fail to fully capture the asset’s potential. Lubin emphasized Ethereum’s growing role as a foundational layer for decentralized finance, artificial intelligence, and global trust systems.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/20/ethereum-news-joseph-lubin-explains-why-market-still-undervalues-eth/
